name: NAVALNY: A Nightmare of Corrupt
short_description: Russia 2024. The Internet has been isolated for a long time, leaving the country is prohibited. A law on the return of serfdom is under consideration.
detailed_description:
About the game:
NAVALNY: A Nightmare of Corrupt is a game in the quest genre, the actions of which unfold in the beautiful Russian reality. Explore more than 20 colorful locations. Make your own unique choice that will affect the further plot.

Plot:
You play as the most typical official. Give him time, he will steal the Sun from the sky. Having fallen asleep in a hotel, our hero finds himself in his personal nightmare, moving forward several years, to the night of 2024. The grandiose operation was carried out successfully. All the criminals were caught. You are the last of their representatives left at large. And now, your palace detects a drone. Rest assured, they have already left for you. Whether you can defeat Navalny or voluntarily surrender is up to you.
